name: Segun Aluko
context: Forwarded Phoenix Trading FZCO v. Dennis Corp court decision (4:22-cv-02355) to Dayo Adu as adversarial intelligence on Tyler MacPhearson/Crypto Can Man Ltd. Identified prior 2022 US crypto mining lawsuit involving Tyler as relevant pattern-of-conduct evidence for NRG Bloom v TON dispute.
background: Nigerian-licensed attorney dual-qualified in California and Nigeria. Started career at Aluko & Oyebode (top-tier Nigerian firm). Prior role: Business Affairs Executive at William Morris Endeavor. Education: LL.B. Obafemi Awolowo University; LL.M. USC Gould School of Law; MBA UCLA Anderson.
notes: Do NOT contact directly without Dayo Adu's knowledge. Maintain chain of relationships. Has access to US legal databases (PACER/OffshoreAlert). Potential future asset for cross-border US-Nigeria legal matters.
